name: Goblin and Coins II: The Lost Recipes
short_description: A much easier stand-alone expansion to Goblin and Coins II. Use unlimited continues to run and double-jump through 25 handcrafted levels, and retrieve the recipes lost in the midnight raid from the original game.
detailed_description:
A much easier stand-alone expansion to Goblin and Coins II. Use unlimited continues to run and double-jump through 25 handcrafted levels, and retrieve the recipes lost in the midnight raid from the original game.



  • Familiar mechanics and enemies, but improved!
  • 25 handcrafted levels (that get a bit challenging close to the end, but are a walk in the park compared to most of the GnC2 maze-like levels)
  • Unlimited continues / level restarts
  • No boss fights, just platforming fun!
  • Double-jump available from the very start of the game
  • Locked chests, portals, secret areas...
  • 5 brand new recipes to unlock, prepare in the oven, and post your artwork to the game hub
